title: SCBE Build Thread
text: We cleaned and hardened the SCBE pipeline top-to-bottom. Next: n8n-powered X + merch automation, real dispatch logs, and governed retriggers. Thread starts here.
cta: Follow for build logs + live automation drops.

title: Dispatcher Upgrade
text: Dispatch payloads now include full post metadata. That unlocks reply routing, merch actions, and cleaner analytics in one webhook path.
cta: Reply with your stack; we’ll publish a template.

title: Reply Queue - Questions
text: Appreciate the question. We route this through claim gate + approval before posting so each answer is source-backed and reusable.
cta: Drop your use case and we’ll map it.

title: Merch Promo - Creator Pack
text: New Creator Ops Pack is live: templates for posting, replies, and conversion loops across X + n8n.

title: Catalog Sync
text: Syncing new product assets and descriptions to storefront channels.
